name: Danske Invest Nye Markeder Small Cap KL DKK d
summary: Danske Invest Nye Markeder Small Cap KL DKK d is a fund that invests in small-cap equities in emerging markets. It aims to provide investors with exposure to smaller companies in emerging markets, which often have higher growth potential compared to larger, more established companies, denominated in DKK. The fund is managed by Danske Invest.
